title: Transport Layer
text:
Clients MUST send RPC messages to the zrpc plugin using the Zellij pipe mechanism (`zellij pipe`).

The pipe MUST be addressed with the name `zjctl-rpc`. Clients MUST include the `--plugin` flag specifying the plugin URL and the `--plugin-configuration` flag with a session-scoped configuration string of the form `zjctl_session=<SANITIZED_SESSION_NAME>`.

The sanitized session name MUST replace any character outside `[a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]` with `_`.

The request payload MUST be written to the pipe's stdin as a single JSON line followed by a newline. The response MUST be read from the pipe's stdout. The pipe process MUST be waited on until completion.

Only `PipeSource::Cli` messages MUST be handled by the plugin; messages from other pipe sources MUST be ignored.
